content: Apple Inc. was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.
raw_content: Apple Inc. was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.
reasoning: Okay, so I need to figure out when Apple Inc. was founded. I remember that Apple is a big tech company, but I'm not exactly sure of the founding date. Let me think... I've heard the names Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak associated with Apple. They were the co-founders, right? I think Apple was started in the 1970s because that's when personal computers were starting to become a thing. Maybe 1976 or 1977? I'm not 100% sure. I should probably double-check that. Wait, I also remember that Apple was originally called something else, maybe Apple Computer Inc., and they made the Apple I and Apple II computers. The Apple II was one of the first successful mass-produced personal computers, so that must have been after the company was founded. I think the company was founded in 1976, but I'm not certain. Maybe I should look up some historical facts to confirm. Oh, and I think it was founded in a garage, which was a common startup story back then. So putting it all together, I'm pretty sure Apple Inc. was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and maybe another person, possibly Ronald Wayne. Yeah, that sounds right.
